description_long: This is a whimsical, stylized biplane with a vibrant orange and red color scheme, featuring flame-like patterns along the wings and fuselage. The airplane has two stacked wings with rounded edges and circular insignias, and its tail is designed with feather-like extensions, giving it a bird-inspired appearance. The cockpit is enclosed with blue-tinted windows and is positioned at the front of the fuselage, with a visible propeller at the nose. The landing gear consists of two main wheels and a small tail wheel, all fixed and exposed. Decorative streamers trail from the upper wings, adding to the playful, fantasy-inspired design. The overall construction suggests a lightweight, possibly wooden or composite frame with painted surfaces and some metallic components for structural support.
description: A stylized orange and red biplane with flame motifs, feathered tail, and blue-tinted cockpit windows. Features include stacked wings, fixed landing gear, and decorative streamers.
description_view_0: Side view showing the feathered tail, flame-patterned wings, and blue cockpit windows.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the dual stacked wings, propeller, and symmetrical landing gear.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with clear visibility of the cockpit, wing patterns, and tail design.
description_view_3: Rear view emphasizing the feathered tail structure and trailing streamers from the wings.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Biplane configuration with two straight, mid-mounted wings stacked vertically, no visible winglets, and slight dihedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Single front-mounted piston engine with a visible propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and feather-like horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Fixed taildragger landing gear with two main wheels and one tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with blue-tinted windows, likely single-seat.
